characters.name: Chase Adams
characters.description: Chase AdamsGeneral informationBirthdateca. 1988/1989Age18(season 4)22–24(seasons 5–6)25–27(seasons 7–9)ResidenceTree Hill,North CarolinaOccupationBartender atTRIC(seasons 6–9)Former:Carpet salesman(between seasons 4 and 5)EducationTree Hill High School(Class of2007)Unnamed university(departed without degree)Extended informationNickname(s)ChasteGenderMaleHair colorBrownEye colorBrownHeight6’ 0” (1.83 m)RelationshipsMarital statusSingleSignificant other(s)Brooke Davis(ex-girlfriend:S4)Mia Catalano(ex-girlfriend:S6•S7)Alex Dupre(ex-girlfriend:S8•S9)Tara Richards(fling:S9)Series informationPortrayed byStephen CollettiFirst appearance"Resolve"(episode 4.12)Last appearance"One Tree Hill"(episode 9.13)Episode count60S1•S2•S3•S4•S5•S6•S7•S8•S9 Chase Adamswas a secondary character introduced in thefourth seasonofOne Tree Hill. Transferring toTree Hill High Schoolduring his senior year, Chase became a member of theClean Teensabstinence club. He formed a relationship withBrooke Davisthroughout the year but they eventually broke up for reasons unknown after Graduation - most likely due to her newfound fame as the Clothes over Bro's creator. He returned toTree Hillsome time later and was currently the owner atTRIC, afterKaren Roeupon Haley's request sold it to Chase right before the series finale. DuringSeason 6andSeason 7he datedMia Catalano, who broke up with him over a text message at the end of Season 7. He then had a troubled relationship with performer,Alex Dupréconflicting with this time with Mia but once he joined the air force and a year after he got out they reconciled. However, they broke up when she leftTree Hillafter accepting an offer to go on tour fromChris Keller. Chase had one serious relationship. He realized his girlfriend had been cheating on him with his best friend for a long while, leaving him with a wariness of relationships and a need for honesty. He joined Clean Teens in an attempt to start over. Chase shares with Brooke that was younger he learned to dance by watching his parents dancing ballroom routines when he was supposed to be in bed, implying his parents had a loving marriage. Chase had an avid interest in skateboarding.

characters.name: Angie
characters.description: This article or section is astub. You can help the One Tree Hill Wiki byexpanding it. AngieGeneral informationFull nameAngieStatusAliveExtended informationNickname(s)Little Girl, Baby Girl, Baby, Silly Rabbit, Funny BunnyGenderFemaleRelationshipsFamilyUnnamed(mother)Unnamed(father)Brooke Davis(foster mother; formerly)Series informationFirst appearance"What Do You Go Home To?"Last appearance"What Comes After the Blues?"Episode count5S1,S2,S3,S4,S5,S6,S7,S8,S9Angiewas the child whoBrooke Davisfostered in order for her to recieve care for her heart condition. Brooke bonded with Angie greatly during their brief time together, but she was eventually returned to her parents afterDr. Ethan Copelandsuccessfully operated on her heart. Angie comes to Tree Hill on a fostering scheme set up for children in poverty who need surgery for them to survive.

characters.name: Anna Sawyer
characters.description: This article or section is astub. You can help the One Tree Hill Wiki byexpanding it. Anna SawyerGeneral informationFull nameAnna Rebecca Sawyer(married name)StatusDeceasedDeath dateca. 1997/1998Cause of deathCar accidentResidenceSawyer residence,Tree Hill,North Carolina(pre-series; prior to her death)Tree Hill cemetery(burial place)EducationTree Hill High School(graduated ca. 1980s)Extended informationGenderFemaleRelationshipsMarital statusMarriedLarry Sawyer(ended by her death)FamilyChildrenPeyton Sawyer(adoptive daughter, withLarry)GrandchildrenSawyer Scott(granddaughter, viaPeyton)ExtendedLucas Scott(son-in-law, viaPeyton)S1•S2•S3•S4•S5•S6•S7•S8•S9Anna Rebecca Sawyerwas the late wife ofLarry Sawyerand the adoptive mother of their daughter,Peyton Sawyer. An unseen character, she died in a car accident after running a red light when she was driving to pick her daughter up from school. Her death would have a profound impact on both her husband and daughter, though it eventually brought them closer together. Peyton would often visit her mother's grave inTree Hill's localTree Hill cemetery.

characters.name: Josh Avery
characters.description: Josh AveryGeneral informationFull nameJosh AveryStatusAliveOccupationActorExtended informationNickname(s)JoshieGenderMaleRelationshipsFamilyMr Avery - FatherMrs Avery - MotherSeries informationPortrayed byPaul TealFirst appearance"At The Bottom Of Everything"Last appearance"Almost Everything I Wish I'd Said The Last Time I Saw You..."Episode count6S1,S2,S3,S4,S5,S6,S7,S8,S9Josh Averywas a successful actor who finally came out following starring in the highly well received movieSeven Dreams Til Tuesdayalongside award-winning actressAlex Duprefollowing a sex tape and short-lived fake relationship. He starred inAlexandJulian'smovie, and enjoyed flirting and making Alex very angry. He also had sex with Alex more that just one time. He made a sex tape with Alex and tried to release it, before Alex found out that he was gay. His ex-boyfriend then tried to out-him, but Alex pretended to be his girlfriend. He went with her to Utah, when most of the Tree hill gang went on Vacation to see the film premier. He left Alex to go tell his parents he was gay at the end of the series. His parents were very proud of him being a lead man. Following him coming out to his parents, it is un clear what their emotions were, though Alex said that if she were his mother there wouldn't be one thing he could say to make her not love him.

characters.name: Julian Baker
characters.description: Julian BakerGeneral informationFull nameJulian Andrew Norris(birth name)Julian Andrew Baker(legal name)StatusAliveResidenceLos Angeles,California(prior to introduction)Tree Hill,North Carolina(seasons 6–9)OccupationFilm directorFilm producerCurrent:Owner of theBaker soundstage(season 9-present)Television showrunner(Ravens; season 9)Extended informationNickname(s)JJamieJuju BeanMr. DavisHusband BakeGarçonJuliaGenderMaleHair colorBrownEye colorBrownHeight6’ 3” (190.5 cm)RelationshipsMarital statusMarried toBrooke Davis(m.2015–present)Significant other(s)Peyton Sawyer(ex-girlfriend)Brooke Davis(wife)Missy King(date)FamilyParentsPaul Norris(father)Sylvia Baker(mother)ChildrenDavisandJude Baker(twin sons, withBrooke)ExtendedRobert "Ted" Davis, Jr.(father-in-law)Victoria Davis(mother-in-law)Series informationPortrayed byAustin NicholsFirst appearance"Our Life is Not a Movie or Maybe"(episode 6.08)Last appearance"One Tree Hill"(episode 9.13)Episode count71S1•S2•S3•S4•S5•S6•S7•S8•S9 Paul Norris(father)Sylvia Baker(mother)ChildrenDavisandJude Baker(twin sons, withBrooke)ExtendedRobert "Ted" Davis, Jr.(father-in-law)Victoria Davis(mother-in-law) Julian Andrew Baker(néNorris) is a film producer who arrived inTree Hillto create afilm adaptionofLucas Scott'sfirst novel, who was unaware of Julian's history withPeyton Sawyer. He eventually revealed an interest in Peyton's best friend,Brooke Davis. When the film's production fell through, he left town for Los Angeles, but Brooke, who had realized and accepted her feelings for him, followed him. Deciding to let him into her life, the two reunited. The two then embarked on a long-distance relationship while he made a new movie, but they eventually reunited in Tree Hill, and got engaged. The couple was later married, and had twin sons,DavisandJude Baker. After the birth of his children, he acquired asoundstageand began a TV series based on Brooke's life in high school calledRavens

characters.name: Faith Banks
characters.description: Faith BanksGeneral informationBirthdateca. 1988/1989StatusAliveAge17(season 3)ResidenceTree Hill,North Carolina(prior to introduction)River City,North Carolina(season 3)OccupationHigh school studentEducationTree Hill High School(departed; prior to introduction)Unnamed high school(season 3)Extended informationGenderFemaleHair colorBlackEye colorBrownRelationshipsFamilyMrs. Banks(mother)Series informationPortrayed byMekia CoxOnly appearance"Brave New World"(episode 3.10)Episode count1S1•S2•S3•S4•S5•S6•S7•S8•S9Faith Banksis a minor character during thethird seasonofOne Tree Hill, portrayed byMekia Cox. An old friend ofLucas Scott, she was a former student atTree Hill High Schooland an original member of theRiver Courtsquad. During her time inTree Hill, she often played basketball alongside Lucas,Skills Taylor,Junk Moretti, andFergie Thompsonbefore moving away prior to theseries premiere. After her mother received a job offer as the boy's varsity basketball coach at another school, Faith moved to neighboringRiver City, where she lived through her senior year of high school. In her only appearance in the series, Lucas came to visit her after he andPeyton Sawyertraveled there to visit herbirth mother. During that visit, Faith and Lucas recounted their history together and their time at the River Court. During her freshman year atTree Hill High School, Faith and her friends were bullied byMorgan Finley, captain of theRavenscheerleaders. AfterLucas Scottstood up to them, Morgan and the other cheerleaders left Faith and her friends alone but turned their attention to Lucas, whom they continued to bully for the remainder of the school year.

characters.name: Tony Battle
characters.description: This article or section is astub. You can help the One Tree Hill Wiki byexpanding it. Tony BattleGeneral informationFull nameTony BattleStatusAliveOccupationBasketball PlayerExtended informationGenderMaleRelationshipsFamilyChuck Battle - FatherSusan Battle - MotherAliyah Battle - SisterCam Battle - BrotherSeries informationFirst appearance"Like You Like an Arsonist"Last appearance"All Tomorrow's Parties"Episode count2S1,S2,S3,S4,S5,S6,S7,S8,S9Tony Battlewas one of the basketball players who befriendingNathan Scottduring his time at High Flyers. Tony invited Nathan andLucas Scottover to his house to have dinner with him and his family. The Scott brothers see the manDancould've been if his glory days had not left him bitter. Tony's father was a basketball player himself who eventually quit to raise Tony with his mother. He struggled with two jobs but refocused his passion for basketball towards providing a loving home for Tony, his mother and his siblings.

characters.name: Will Bennett
characters.description: This article or section is astub. You can help the One Tree Hill Wiki byexpanding it. Will BennettGeneral informationBirthplaceOnslow County,North CarolinaStatusDeceasedCause of deathCar accidentOccupationUnknownExtended informationNickname(s)NoneGenderMaleHair colorBrownEye colorBrownHeight6' 0"RelationshipsFamilyBill Bennett (brother)Series informationPortrayed byEdwin HodgeFirst appearance"The Space In Between" (episode 8.03)Last appearance"The Space In Between" (episode 8.03)Episode count1 Will Bennettwas a hospital patient whoClay Evansbefriended during his comatose state, and was the first spirit he interacted with in his subconscious followingQuinn James's recovery a week before. Will spends his time showing Clay the people that love and care about him such as Quinn,Jamie,NathanandHaley. Clay learns that Will had gotten into a car accident due to texting while driving, which the former chastises Will for. While the two are in the waiting room, they hear flatlining and realize that one of them has died. Will is revealed to have been the one that died and many of his internal organs were donated to other patients in need, including his kidney, which is donated to Clay and helps to save Clay's life.

characters.name: Abby Brown
characters.description: Abby BrownGeneral informationFull nameAbigail BrownStatusAliveExtended informationGenderFemaleRelationshipsFamilyHope Brown- MotherSeries informationPortrayed byAllison ScagliottiFirst appearance"With Tired Eyes, Tired Minds, Tired Souls, We Slept"Last appearance"The Runaway Found"Episode count3S1,S2,S3,S4,S5,S6,S7,S8,S9Abigail "Abby" Brownwas a formerTree Hill High Schoolstudent. She was the only person that witnessedDan Scottkill his brother,Keith Scott. She saw Dan kill Keith through the blinds of a classroom. Abby wanted to tell somebody about what she saw in the hallway the day of the shooting, but her mother, Hope Brown wouldn't allow it because she wanted to protect Abby. Her mother made her act crazy whenever someone came inside their house so that nobody would suspect Abby knew the truth about Keith's murder. Abby couldn't return to her regular life which included school, friends, and being a normal teenager because of what she witnessed. Abby only tells two people who killed Keith, her mother, andLucas Scott. After telling Lucas what happened, she and her mother left never to return. Abigail Brown was the only daughter ofHope Brownwho suffered from serious diabetes. As a student atTree Hill High School, she was a quiet girl who enjoyed school and had her own friends, but didn't take notice of some of her classmates such asJimmy Edwards("With Tired Eyes, Tired Minds, Tired Souls, We Slept"). Jimmylets Abby leave the Tutor Center.("With Tired Eyes, Tired Minds, Tired Souls, We Slept") Abigail Brown was the only daughter ofHope Brownwho suffered from serious diabetes. As a student atTree Hill High School, she was a quiet girl who enjoyed school and had her own friends, but didn't take notice of some of her classmates such asJimmy Edwards("With Tired Eyes, Tired Minds, Tired Souls, We Slept").

characters.name: Bucko the Clown
characters.description: Portrayed byChris McNair Bucko the Clownwas the clown hired byDeb Leefor her grandsonJamie's fifth birthday party, something which caused conflict between Deb andHaleywho's fear of clowns made her wary of Bucko. Bucko the Clown was a person who performed at special occasions as a clown. Aside from living in a parking lot in Rock Hill, New York, not much was known about him. However, it was known that he spent time in prison throughout his life, possibly suggesting that this was missed off his CV when asked to perform at children's birthday parties. He completed balloon tricks, jokes and various other clown acts. Bucko the Clown was a person who performed at special occasions as a clown. Aside from living in a parking lot in Rock Hill, New York, not much was known about him. He completed balloon tricks, jokes and various other clown acts.

characters.name: Carrie
characters.description: CarrieGeneral informationStatusDeceasedCause of deathShot byDan ScottResidenceTree Hill,North CarolinaOccupationNanny(season 5)FormerPersonal trainer(prior to introduction)EducationPontiac High School(graduated ca. 2000s)Extended informationNickname(s)Nanny CarrieOthersCrazy CarrieHammy CarriePsycho CarrieCrazy BitchGenderFemaleHair colorBrownEye colorBrownHeight5′ 7″ (1.70 m)RelationshipsMarital statusSingle(at time of death)Significant other(s)Nathan Scott(one-sided attraction:S5)FamilyUnnamed father †(father; deceased pre-S5)Unnamed son †(son; deceased pre-S5)Series informationPortrayed byTorrey DeVittoFirst appearance"4 Years, 6 Months, 2 Days"(episode 5.01)Last appearance"You've Dug Your Own Grave, Now Lie In It"(episode 6.05)Episode count14S1•S2•S3•S4•S5•S6•S7•S8•S9Carrie, also known asNanny Carrie, was Jamie's nanny who was employed afterHaleystarted teaching, to look after him when she couldn't. Carrie, appearing seemingly perfect, slowly started to try to tear the Scott family apart and replace Haley by seducingNathanand acting as a surrogate mother to Jamie. She revealed her seemingly psychotic behavior by kidnapping Jamie after she was fired, but Dan stopped her. She returned later and kidnappedDanin another bid to haveJamieas her own. However, her plan was unsuccessful asHaleyandDebmanaged to stop her before Dan killed her. She was also the second antagonist to die in the series, the first beingDaunte. Others Carrie attended Pontiac, when they played theTree Hill Ravensin the State Championship. She claimed that when the Raven's beat Pontiac she cried for a week. She claimed to have worked as personal trainer at some point in her life.("My Way Home Is Through You")

characters.name: Mia Catalano
characters.description: Mia CatalanoGeneral informationFull nameMia CatalanoStatusAliveExtended informationNickname(s)RockstarGenderFemaleHair colorBrownEye colorBrownRelationshipsSignificant other(s)Jason Federline(ex-boyfriend)Chase Adams(ex-boyfriend)FamilyMark Catalano (father)Jenny Catalano (mother)Maria Catalano (sister)Series informationPortrayed byKate VoegeleFirst appearance"It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding)"(episode 5.04)Last appearance"This Is My House, This Is My Home"(episode 8.22)Episode count35S1•S2•S3•S4•S5•S6•S7•S8•S9 Mia Catalanowas a singer/songwriter based inTree Hillwho has released two best selling albums,Don't Look AwayandA Fine Mess, throughPeytonandHaley's record labelRed Bedroom Records. She was initially a keyboard player shadowed by the big egos in her band but her talent was brought to attention by Haley to Peyton, who proceeded to offer her a solo record contract. She records exclusively forRed Bedroom Recordsand was under contract with the independent label, however,John Knight'sSire Records distributes her albums. She believes that she owes her career toHaleyandPeytonand is extremely grateful to them, even threatening to quit recording for good whenMiranda Stoneof Sire Records tried to shut downRed Bedroom Records. She datedChase Adamsfor over two years, but ended their relationship after they lost contact with one another. Mia was always interested in music, and when she was 8 years old she sang in the school choir alone, but was put off it by fellow student,Terry Adams. She instead joined a band as a background singer and keyboard player. She also writes her own music, although her current boyfriend and band memberJasonwould steal many of her songs. And she often felt very alone and tended to spend weekends online. Mia was always interested in music, and when she was 8 years old she sang in the school choir alone, but was put off it by fellow student,Terry Adams. She instead joined a band as a background singer and keyboard player. She also writes her own music, although her current boyfriend and band memberJasonwould steal many of her songs. And she often felt very alone and tended to spend weekends online.

characters.name: Charlie
characters.description: This article or section is astub. You can help the One Tree Hill Wiki byexpanding it. CharlieGeneral informationFull nameCharlieStatusAliveOccupationProgramming DirectorExtended informationGenderMaleSeries informationPortrayed byTyron McFarlanFirst appearance"Hold My Hand As I'm Lowered"Last appearance"Deep Ocean Vast Sea"Episode count4S1,S2,S3,S4,S5,S6,S7,S8,S9Charliewas the boss ofMouth McFadden, who he clashed with over Mouth's refusal to report the scandal betweenNathan ScottandRenee Richardson. Although not appearing until the seventh season, it is likely that Charlie became the programming director followingAlice Day's firing.

characters.name: Nick Chavez
characters.description: This article or section is astub. You can help the One Tree Hill Wiki byexpanding it. Nick ChavezGeneral informationFull nameNick ChavezStatusAliveOccupationEnglish teacherModelExtended informationGenderMaleHair colorBlackEye colorBrownHeight5' 10" (178 cm)RelationshipsSignificant other(s)Brooke Davis(ex-girlfriend)Tia(fling)Series informationPortrayed byRey ValentinFirst appearance"I Love You But I've Chosen Darkness"Last appearance"All These Things That I've Done"Episode count3Nick Chavezwas an English teacher and former model who started to dateBrooke Davisuntil he discovered she was a student atTree Hill High School, whereupon she discovered he was her new teacher. They continued their affair until Brooke caught Nick cheating on her. He subsequently left the school and resigned his post. Rachel set Brooke up on an online dating website. Nick is introduced in a bar as Brooke's blind date. The two quickly start to like each other. Lying about her age, Brooke lies to him when they come nearTree Hill High Schooland she says that she used to be a cheerleader there. Both of them secretly go inside and have sex in a classroom. Brooke leaves soon after and Nick stays behind. Principal Turner catches Nick coming out of the classroom. The latter says that he was preparing for his first day as a teacher at the school. In her next class, Brooke finds out that Nick is her new English teacher and she runs out of the classroom. She then apologizes to Nick for lying about her age. They both agree to continue the relationship, but not a soul can know about it.

characters.name: Jack Daniels
characters.description: This article or section is astub. You can help the One Tree Hill Wiki byexpanding it. Jack DanielsGeneral informationFull nameJohn Jack DanielsStatusAliveOccupationStudent atTree Hill High SchoolRelationshipsFamilyXavier Daniels(brother)Series informationPortrayed byEvan PetersFirst appearance"You Have to Be Joking (Autopsy of the Devil's Brain)"Last appearance"I Would for You"Episode count6S1,S2,S3,S4,S5,S6,S7,S8,S9John Jack Danielswas a student ofTree Hill High Schooland the best friend, and romantic interest, ofSam Walker. The two formed a close friendship as they were both placed in foster care but Jack eventually leftTree Hillto be with new foster parents out of the state. Not much is known about his early life but his parents aren't around and his brotherXavieris his primary "care taker", but he often doesn't spend time at home because he's heavily abused verbally, and possibly physically having said Xavier beats down on him pretty hard.
